summary: Data Intelligence Module - Complete Testing. All 3 new layers tested: 1) Revenue ML Pipeline (ML models → auto-pricing with confidence scores, explainability), 2) Operational AI (check-in load prediction, housekeeping workload, room readiness ETA, maintenance failure risk), 3) Guest Intelligence (lifetime value, segmentation, churn prediction, upsell recommendations). Turkish language UI. All 25 backend pytest tests pass. Frontend DataIntelligenceDashboard renders with 3 tabs and all features work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Revenue ML Pipeline: Well-implemented with demand forecast, rate elasticity, booking probability, cancellation prediction models feeding into ADR recommendations
Confidence scoring: Proper 0.1-0.95 range with high/medium/low bands and human override threshold at 0.60
Explainability: Each recommendation includes demand_signal, pace_signal, cancellation_risk, price_sensitivity factors
Operational AI: 4 predictors (check-in load, housekeeping workload, room readiness, maintenance risk) with Turkish notes
Guest Intelligence: LTV calculation, 6 segment types, churn prediction with risk factors, upsell recommendations
All endpoints properly authenticated via get_current_user dependency
Turkish language UI labels correctly implemented: 'Pipeline Calistir', 'Talep Tahmini', 'Misafir Deger Dagilimi' etc.
data-testid attributes present on all interactive elements for testing
No mocked APIs - all ML models use real MongoDB data from bookings, rooms, guests, folio_charges, survey_responses, guest_requests, housekeeping_tasks, maintenance_work_orders collections

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 3 tabs load, all interactive features work)

seed_data_creation: Triggered ML pipeline run during testing, generated 6 room type recommendations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Data Intelligence Dashboard at /data-intelligence with 3 tabs: Revenue Intelligence (default), Operational AI, Guest Intelligence. All APIs at /api/data-intelligence/*. Revenue Pipeline execution at POST /api/data-intelligence/revenue/run-pipeline. Guest Intelligence may take a few seconds due to analyzing multiple guests.

revenue_ml_pipeline: test_forecast_dashboard - GET /api/data-intelligence/revenue/forecast-dashboard returns demand_forecast, price_optimization, cancellation_risk, autopricing, ml_recommendations
test_forecast_has_14_days - Forecast contains exactly 14 days of predictions
test_run_pipeline - POST /api/data-intelligence/revenue/run-pipeline returns run_id, recommendations, signals
test_pipeline_recommendation_fields - Recommendations have confidence_score, confidence_band, auto_eligible, requires_human_approval, recommendation_reasons, explainability
test_pipeline_explainability - Explainability includes demand_signal, pace_signal, cancellation_risk, price_sensitivity, recommendation_reason
test_pipeline_signals - Signals include demand_summary, elasticity_summary, cancellation_risk, conversion_rates
test_confidence_threshold_behavior - Scores in 0.1-0.95 range, requires_human_approval when confidence < 0.6
test_get_recommendations - GET /api/data-intelligence/revenue/recommendations returns pending and history
operational_ai: test_operations_dashboard - GET /api/data-intelligence/operations/dashboard returns check_in_load, housekeeping_workload, room_readiness, maintenance_risk
test_checkin_load_structure - Check-in load has total_expected_arrivals, peak_hour, arrival_pressure_score, hourly_forecast, staffing_recommendation
test_housekeeping_workload_structure - HK workload has departures, stayovers, arrivals, total_rooms_to_clean, staffing_recommendation
test_room_readiness_structure - Room readiness has total_rooms_pending, predictions with ETA
test_maintenance_risk_structure - Maintenance risk has total_rooms_analyzed, at_risk_rooms, risk_items
test_maintenance_risk_scoring_range - Risk scores in 0-1 range with high/medium/low levels
test_staffing_recommendations - GET /api/data-intelligence/operations/staffing returns front_desk, housekeeping, combined_pressure
guest_intelligence: test_guest_dashboard - GET /api/data-intelligence/guests/dashboard returns value_distribution, segment_distribution, churn_risk_summary, top_value_guests, high_churn_guests, upsell_opportunities
test_value_distribution_tiers - Value distribution includes platinum, gold, silver, bronze tiers
test_churn_risk_labels - Churn risk summary includes high, medium, low labels
tenant_isolation: test_invalid_token - Returns 401/403 for invalid Bearer token
empty_fallback: test_pipeline_with_no_room_type - Returns empty recommendations for non-existent room type

frontend_playwright_tests: 3 Tabs present: Revenue Intelligence (default), Operational AI, Guest Intelligence
Revenue Intelligence tab: Summary cards (Ort. Doluluk, Riskli Rez., Bekleyen Oneri, Uygulanan), Pipeline Calistir button, Demand Forecast (14 days), Son ML Onerileri table
Pipeline Calistir button triggers POST /api/data-intelligence/revenue/run-pipeline and displays Pipeline Sonuclari with room types (Deluxe, Family, Junior Suite, Standard, Suite, Superior)
Pipeline results show: room_type, confidence_band (Orta Guven), current_rate → suggested_rate, change_pct, recommendation_reasons with explainability
Operational AI tab: Summary cards (Beklenen Varis, Temizlenecek Oda, Hazirlik Bekleyen, Bakim Riski)
Staffing recommendations: Resepsiyon Personel Onerisi (1 onerilen ajan), Housekeeping Personel Onerisi (1 onerilen personel) with pressure badges
Check-in Saatlik Dagilim hourly forecast chart
Guest Intelligence tab: Summary cards (Analiz Edilen: 20, Platinum Misafir: 0, Yuksek Kayip Riski: 0, Upsell Firsati: 8)
Misafir Deger Dagilimi: Platinum (0), Gold (0), Silver (2), Bronze (18)
Yuksek Kayip Riski: Empty state 'Yuksek riskli misafir yok'
Upsell Firsatlari: 8 opportunities with guest names (Basak Kaya, Serkan Muller, Elena Sahin, etc.) and TL values

mocked_api_note: No APIs are mocked for the Data Intelligence module. All ML models use real MongoDB data from bookings, rooms, guests, folio_charges, survey_responses, guest_requests, housekeeping_tasks, maintenance_work_orders collections.
